import React from "react"; import { Plus, Trash2, Upload, X } from "lucide-react"; const Sources = ({ rssSources, setRssSources, showAddSource, setShowAddSource, newSource, setNewSource, uploadedFiles, setUploadedFiles }) => (

RSS Feed Sources

{rssSources.map(source => (

{source.name}

{source.url}

{source.lastSync && (

Last sync: {source.lastSync}

)}
))}

Upload Articles

Drop PDF files here or click to browse

{ const files = Array.from(e.target.files); // To-do: Implement logic to update uploadedFiles state console.log("Files selected:", files); }} />
{uploadedFiles.length > 0 && (

Uploaded Files

{uploadedFiles.map(file => (

{file.name}

Uploaded: {file.uploadDate} • Status: {file.status} • Articles: {file.articles}

))}
)}
